post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 190 (Newbie Game 78): Ranger's Apprentice Mafia


Story
In Redmont Fief, the Rangers have always done a good job keeping everyone safe, but recently, people have been found murdered in Castle Redmont. Once warm and full of cheer, the atmosphere in the castle has become tense and people are looking suspiciously over their shoulders. Whispered rumors have been going around in the castle staff about who might be responsible for the deaths, but nobody can figure out who has been doing the killing, not even the Rangers. Then one fine morning, mathjay (Master Chubb) was found boiled alive in his own famous tomato soup, the kitchens echoed with the sound of sloppy cooking and sobbing - though no one one could tell whether they were mourning the soup or the head cook. And the next night, Madelyn (Lady Pauline), the head diplomat, was killed in her own office, enraging the castle staff beyond consolation because she had been well loved. And so the members of the castle decided to get to the bottom of the matter and figure out who were the evil invaders who had killed so many innocent people. With the help of Baron Arald, Malcolm and possibly the Rangers, the castle staff swore to take down whoever had invaded their home.


Rules Summary
A TL;DR Guide to the Rules ya Gotta Know to Not Die
  1. You really should hire a lawyer, or be your own, cuz we're gonna lawyer the hecc out here
  2. Yeah so, the big nonos are: never EDIT, never DELETE, don't be that person who goofs cuz they didnt read the rules *cough* and accidentally loses the game for your team
  3. Each mafia "day" is 2 real life weeks. It'll be boring as heck except for the last 3 days. Night lasts 3 days, during which most of y'all will just twiddle your thumbs
  4. When voting, we will absolutely ignore your votes if you don't do everything exactly right, and just sayin you could screw yourself really badly cuz you accidentally voted and we ain't caring
  5. For Day 1, even if everyone decides to hang daheck out of someone, they won't die until the day ends, BUT starting Day 2 that could totally happen, so go crazy or go grey I guess
  6. Never, ever, EVER talk about or even MENTION this game when you're not under moderator supervision. We're serious. We'll ground you. Without mercy
  7. This is for all da newbies out there: if you don't know what to do, just pester your friendly neighborhood SEs and ICs until they get off their lazy butts and do their job, since us mods really shouldn't help you
  8. Also I dunno how else you guys could possibly screw up besides these big red flags, but whatever, if and when you do, we'll add more here I guess
  9. Oh and yeah, try to have fun I guess. :thonk:

  • Rules
    Credits to Binomial-theorem, chaotic_iak, willwang123, and fdas among others for the rule template.

    • Read the rules. All of them. Read them multiple times if necessary.
    • Do not post at night.
    • You may use your role PM to ask questions, such as rule clarifications or anything else.
    • Do not quote or pretend to quote any PMs from the mods, including role PMs.
    • Do not talk about this game outside of this topic to anyone other than the mods in charge, unless you are specifically given permission to do so.
    • Do not talk about other ongoing games in this thread.
    • You may not use any formatting that has an effect of concealing text. This includes size=1, hide="", color=#FFFFFF, and color=white, among others.
    • Hide tags are allowed as long as they conform to the above rule.
    • Do not edit or delete posts you have already submitted, even for things like typos: what goes in the thread stays in the thread. Instead, use EBWOP or EBWON as necessary.
    • If you are dead, do not post anything else about the game anywhere. You may still spectate the game, but you may no longer post in this thread.
    • Do not use the colors red (#FF0000), blue (#0000FF), green (#008000), or anything that appears similar, as these colors are used for modding purposes.
    • Do not abuse loopholes.

  • Voting and Hanging
    • This game is based on deadline hang. This means that the player with the most votes at the deadline will be hanged.
    • If two players have the same amount of votes when the deadline is reached, the player who reached that amount of votes first will be hanged.
    • Starting Day 2, if a player reaches a majority of votes, then that player will be hanged.
    • Post votes in bold font in the format "Vote: <insert player here>". Since AoPS does not distinguish between usernames with different capitalizations, the capitalization of the player name does not matter. For example, "Vote: fdas" and "Vote: fDAs" are acceptable votes, while "Vote: fdas", "Vote fdas", “vote: fdas, "Vote:fdas", "Vote: fads", "Vote: fdsa", and "Vote: fdas" are not.
    • Spell the username of the player you wish to vote for exactly and do not use nicknames. There is one exception to this; see below.
    • For the purpose of voting, l (lowercase L) and I (uppercase i) are identical.
    • Votes in hide or tip tags will not be counted.
    • Improperly made votes will not be counted under any circumstances. It does not matter if it is the end of the game hammer and everyone revealed their roles. Hint: don’t reveal your roles and declare victory until the mods say the game is officially over. If you want to purposely fake vote, give the mods a heads up in your role PM so it is not accidentally counted.
    • You may vote for a no hang to occur during day. Vote this by including in your post "Vote: No Hang".
    • If there is an even number of players, half of the players voting for no hang is considered a majority, but only for no hang.
    • You do not have to unvote before making a new vote, but if you wish to, unvote in the format "Unvote". An unvote will undo your previous vote, if any.
    • The moment the deadline passes, no more votes will be counted even if the mod has not made a post, and the game will proceed into twilight.
    • During twilight, players may still post. However, no more votes and/or unvotes will be processed.
    • Once the end-of-day scene is posted, the person hanged is officially dead and their role will be revealed. Night then immediately begins. You may not post during night.

  • Activity
    • Each day will be 336 hours (14 days). The moderators may extend the deadline for the end of the day at their discretion. Note that this will be unlikely and will usually only happen in circumstances of extreme inactivity or replacements too close to end of day.
    • The deadline will occur the very second 336 hours has occurred.
    • The night deadline will be 72 hours (3 days) after night begins.
    • When the night deadline is met, if the moderator does not receive a night action from either a player or their partner(s) (if they have them), the player will lose their chance to perform an action during that night.
    • Any night results will be sent after the night deadline
    • Night will end some time after the night deadline when the mods make the post announcing the end of night. You may not post until the moderators say you can, even if the night deadline has passed.
    • If a player does not make a game-advancing post in a 48-hour period and they are not in V/LA (Vacation/Long Absence), they will receive an in-game prod.
    • If a player does not make a game-advancing post in another 24-hour period after receiving an in-game prod and they are not in V/LA, they will receive a PM prod.
    • If a player does not make a game-advancing post in another 36-hour period after receiving a PM prod and they are not in V/LA, they will be replaced, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement.
    • If a player receives 5 PM Prods, they will be force replaced.
    • If a player is going to be in V/LA, they must post in bold in-thread or PM the mods. The moderators will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.

  • Etiquette
    •  Do not use inappropriate language.
    •  Do not make any personal attacks.
    •  Follow all of the rules.
    •  Be mature.
    •  For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to three warnings, SE’s up to two, and IC’s one. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a modkill-level infraction, they will be modkilled or force-replaced at the mods' discretion. Please do not do anything bad enough to deserve a modkill.

  • Moderators
    • Madelyn is the moderator of Mafia Game 190 and mathjay is the other moderator
    • Red-colored text (#FF0000) is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
    • Blue-colored text (#0000FF) is used for the moderators' posts other than votecounts and activity checks.
    • Green-colored text (#00FF00) is used for town flavor-related posts.
    • The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
    • If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
    • The moderators may change the rules at any time.
    • The moderators have the last say in interpreting the rules.
Setup
This game will use the Backup6 setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Before the game starts, the setup will be randomly chosen from 6 possible role combinations:
  1. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Town Universal Backup, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
  2. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
  3. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
  4. 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
  5. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
  6. 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town Universal Backup, 2 Mafia Goons
Also there are a couple other setup mechanics that should be clarified:
  • This game is Dawn start until everyone confirms, at which point it will be Day 1, and the deadline will be 14 days from then.
  • There are no Night 0 actions.
  • Doctors cannot protect themselves two nights in a row.
  • If applicable, a Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town
  • Jailkeeper's action.
  • Mafia roleblocker can kill and roleblock in the same night.
  • Cop results are sane.
  • Mafia may only discuss in the mafia Quicktopic during night.

Role PMs
Castle Staff (Vanilla Townie) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are part of the Castle Staff. (Vanilla Townie). All you are trying to do is get your work done, but it is getting harder with the fear of getting killed. It's time for you to take action. Alone you are powerless, but with the other castle staff and the Rangers, if you can even trust anybody, you are capable of rooting out the evil once and for all.

Your strength comes in your voice and your vote.

The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
Malcolm (Town Doctor) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Malcolm (Town Doctor). You live deep in Grimsdell Forest, and when you heard about all the deaths in Castle Redmont you rushed over to see if you could do anything to help. With many years of experience, you are an expert healer.

Every night you may PM me the name of a player you want to protect. That person will then be protected from being killed by the Mafia that night.

The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
Gilan (Town Tracker) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Gilan (Town Tracker). Halt's former apprentice, you are a well known and skilled ranger. You are excellent at unseen movement, maybe even the best in the whole kingdom. You are also an expert tracker, being able to tell what passed through from the faintest scuffs on the ground.

Every night you may PM me the name of a player. You will be informed who that player visited (targeted), if any.

The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
Baron Arald (Town Jailkeeper) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Baron Arald (Town Jailkeeper), the baron of Redmont Fief and the head of Redmont Castle. With this position of authority you are able to have people put in jail. By putting people in jail you can keep an eye on them and make sure they don't do anything. This also protects them from being killed.

Once a night, you may PM me one player's name. You will roleblock them, preventing them from using their night action, if any, and you will also protect them from being killed by the Mafia.

The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
Halt (Town Cop) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Halt (Town Cop). You are one of the oldest Rangers, almost a legend to common folk and other rangers alike. One of your skills is being able to sit unnoticed in a room full of people and observe. With your years of experience and excellent memory for small details, you can determine whether a person is loyal to the kingdom.

Once a night, you may PM me one player's name. At the end of the night you will be informed if they are aligned with town or mafia (or if you failed to receive results).

The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
Will (Universal Backup) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are Will (Town Universal Backup), and Halt's former apprentice. You may have only recently finished your apprenticeship, but Halt has taught you well and you are extremely skilled. If needed, you are willing and able to fill in for those who die.

If a town aligned power role dies, you will inherit their powers.

The thread can be found here.

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
Invader (Mafia Goon) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are an Invader (Mafia Goon). You are trying to take over the castle by killing everybody until you and your partner are the only ones left. Even though Baron Arald is a fair leader, you still hold a grudge against him and his Rangers.

You and your partner, [username], [role name], can choose to kill a town player every night. During the night, you may discuss in this QT. The thread can be found here.

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
Educated Invader (Mafia Roleblocker) wrote:
Hello [player],

You are an Educated Invader (Mafia Roleblocker). You are trying to take over the castle by killing everybody until you and your partner are the only ones left. With your minimal education, you learned about sleeping potions. You work in the castle kitchen, so it is not hard for you to slip a potion into someones glass at dinner. Your sleeping potions cause people to fall into a deep sleep and be unable to wake up until the morning.

With your partner, [username], [flavor] (Mafia Goon), you can choose to kill a town member every night. In addition, you may target one player every night. If that player performs a night action, it will be blocked.

During the night, you may discuss in this QT. The thread can be found here.

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!

[*] If a player does not make a game-advancing post in another 36-hour period after receiving a PM prod and they are not in V/LA, they will be replaced, unless they post before the moderators find a replacement.
[*] If a player receives 5 PM Prods, they will be force replaced.
[*] If a player is going to be in V/LA, they must post in [b]bold[/b] in-thread or PM the mods. The moderators will not prod the player unless the V/LA is too long.[list]
[/hide]

[*][hide=Etiquette]
[list]
[*]  Do not use inappropriate language.
[*]  Do not make any personal attacks.
[*]  Follow all of the rules.
[*]  Be mature.
[*]  For a minor rule infraction, newbies can receive up to three warnings, SE’s up to two, and IC’s one. If a player commits an infraction after they have run out of warnings, or commits a modkill-level infraction, they will be modkilled or force-replaced at the mods' discretion. Please do not do anything bad enough to deserve a modkill.[/list]
[/hide]

[*][hide=Moderators]
[list]
[*] Madelyn is the moderator of Mafia Game 190 and mathjay is the other moderator
[*] [color=#FF0000]Red-colored text (#FF0000)[/color] is used for official votecounts and activity checks by the moderators. It is also used for mafia flavor-related posts.
[*] [color=#0000FF]Blue-colored text (#0000FF)[/color] is used for the moderators' posts other than votecounts and activity checks. 
[*] [color=#00FF00]Green-colored text (#00FF00)[/color] is used for town flavor-related posts.
[*] The not voting section is to be ignored if it contradicts any other part of the votecount.
[*] If an error to the votecount is not pointed out within 5 days, the incorrect votecount will become official.
[*] The moderators may change the rules at any time.
[*] The moderators have the last say in interpreting the rules. [/list]
[/hide][/list]
[hide=Setup]This game will use the [url=https://wiki.mafiascum.net/index.php?title=Backup6]Backup6[/url] setup. This is a semi-open setup.

In this setup, there are 9 players. Before the game starts, the setup will be randomly chosen from 6 possible role combinations:
[list=1][*] 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 1 Town Universal Backup, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
[*] 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 2 Mafia Goons
[*] 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Town Tracker, 2 Mafia Goons
[*] 6 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Jailkeeper, 2 Mafia Goons
[*] 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Cop, 1 Town Doctor, 1 Mafia Goon, 1 Mafia Roleblocker
[*] 5 Vanilla Townies, 1 Town Tracker, 1 Town Universal Backup, 2 Mafia Goons[/list]
Also there are a couple other setup mechanics that should be clarified: 
[list][*] This game is Dawn start until everyone confirms, at which point it will be Day 1, and the deadline will be 14 days from then. 
[*] There are no Night 0 actions. 
[*] Doctors cannot protect themselves two nights in a row.
[*] If applicable, a Mafia Roleblocker's action takes precedence over a Town 
[*] Jailkeeper's action.
[*] Mafia roleblocker can kill and roleblock in the same night.
[*] Cop results are sane.
[*] Mafia may only discuss in the mafia Quicktopic during night.[/list]

[hide=Role PMs]
[quote=Castle Staff (Vanilla Townie)]
Hello [player],

You are part of the [color=#0f0]Castle Staff. (Vanilla Townie)[/color]. All you are trying to do is get your work done, but it is getting harder with the fear of getting killed. It's time for you to take action. Alone you are powerless, but with the other castle staff and the Rangers, if you can even trust anybody, you are capable of rooting out the evil once and for all.

Your strength comes in your voice and your vote.

The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote] 

[quote=Malcolm (Town Doctor)]
Hello [player],

You are [color=#0f0]Malcolm (Town Doctor)[/color]. You live deep in Grimsdell Forest, and when you heard about all the deaths in Castle Redmont you rushed over to see if you could do anything to help. With many years of experience, you are an expert healer.

Every night you may PM me the name of a player you want to protect. That person will then be protected from being killed by the Mafia that night.

The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote]

[quote=Gilan (Town Tracker)]
Hello [player],

You are [color=#0f0]Gilan (Town Tracker)[/color]. Halt's former apprentice, you are a well known and skilled ranger. You are excellent at unseen movement, maybe even the best in the whole kingdom. You are also an expert tracker, being able to tell what passed through from the faintest scuffs on the ground. 

Every night you may PM me the name of a player. You will be informed who that player visited (targeted), if any. 

The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote]

[quote=Baron Arald (Town Jailkeeper)]
Hello [player],

You are [color=#0f0]Baron Arald (Town Jailkeeper)[/color], the baron of Redmont Fief and the head of Redmont Castle. With this position of authority you are able to have people put in jail. By putting people in jail you can keep an eye on them and make sure they don't do anything. This also protects them from being killed.

Once a night, you may PM me one player's name. You will roleblock them, preventing them from using their night action, if any, and you will also protect them from being killed by the Mafia. 

The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote]

[quote=Halt (Town Cop)]
Hello [player],

You are [color=#0f0]Halt (Town Cop)[/color]. You are one of the oldest Rangers, almost a legend to common folk and other rangers alike. One of your skills is being able to sit unnoticed in a room full of people and observe. With your years of experience and excellent memory for small details, you can determine whether a person is loyal to the kingdom.

Once a night, you may PM me one player's name. At the end of the night you will be informed if they are aligned with town or mafia (or if you failed to receive results).

The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote]

[quote=Will (Universal Backup)]
Hello [player],

You are [color=#0f0]Will (Town Universal Backup)[/color], and Halt's former apprentice. You may have only recently finished your apprenticeship, but Halt has taught you well and you are extremely skilled. If needed, you are willing and able to fill in for those who die.

If a town aligned power role dies, you will inherit their powers.

The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when all Mafia are killed. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote]

[quote=Invader (Mafia Goon)]
Hello [player],

You are an [color=#c00]Invader (Mafia Goon)[/color]. You are trying to take over the castle by killing everybody until you and your partner are the only ones left. Even though Baron Arald is a fair leader, you still hold a grudge against him and his Rangers.

You and your partner, [username], [role name], can choose to kill a town player every night. During the night, you may discuss in [url=http://bitly.com/98K8eH]this QT[/url]. The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote]

[quote=Educated Invader (Mafia Roleblocker)]
Hello [player],

You are an[color=#c00] Educated Invader (Mafia Roleblocker)[/color]. You are trying to take over the castle by killing everybody until you and your partner are the only ones left. With your minimal education, you learned about sleeping potions. You work in the castle kitchen, so it is not hard for you to slip a potion into someones glass at dinner. Your sleeping potions cause people to fall into a deep sleep and be unable to wake up until the morning.

With your partner, [username], [flavor] (Mafia Goon), you can choose to kill a town member every night. In addition, you may target one player every night. If that player performs a night action, it will be blocked. 

During the night, you may discuss in [url=http://bitly.com/98K8eH]this QT[/url]. The thread can be found [url=https://i.ibb.co/Mg0nt5m/defenestration.gif]here[/url].

You win when the mafia are the only ones left, or if nothing can prevent it. Play towards your win condition, and good luck!
[/quote][/hide]

post_rendered:
Hello boys and girls, and today I am going to teach you my step-by-step guide on how to cook water. This is a recipe that has been sent down my family for generations.
This is my great method on how to cook the best water in the known universe.

INGREDIENTS:

500ml water

The first step to cooking water is to wash your water profusely. Back in the olden days of 1983, many people were killed for serving water that had not been washed. Many professional water chefs will spend up to 40 years perfecting this craft.

To wash your water, you will first need a sieve. Pour your water through your sieve, and wash the remaining water by pouring more water into your sieve, which now should have become empty due to the fact sieves cannot hold water. Do not collect this water, it is the mafia and must be hung.

Pour your water into a small bowl that can hold at the very most 25ml of liquid. Use a large whisk to scramble this water, and make sure that both the yolk and the white of the water is well combined. It is very important you do not season your water at this stage, or else everything in your life will be ruined.

Heat a large wok on a very high heat, and preheat your fridge to 45 degrees Celsius. Heat a splash of crude oil in your wok, until it is beginning to smoke. Then, remove the crude oil to punish it for smoking, because smoking is a very bad habit which can lead to cancer. Next, preheat your grill and fill it with 4 gallons of sunflower oil.

Mix 100g of flour with 5og of panko breadcrumbs and 50g of salt. Coat your water in this mixture, and place it in the grill overnight, letting the flavors get to know each other. If your breadcrumbs do not sizzle upon contact with the water, it means that they are the mafia.

By now, your water should be nice and crispy, but we aren’t done yet! Destroy your kitchen to drain the oil, and place your cooked water in the preheated fridge to cool down. Once it is down to 50 degrees, repair your kitchen and get a small saucepan.

Fill your saucepan with exactly 80ml of crude oil, 20l balsamic vinegar, and your cooked water. Bring this to a boil until your water’s crust has completely vanished, and there is no liquid left aside from water. If there is still liquid after frying the water, it means that your water is the sheriff and should be promptly put in the freezer for safekeeping.

By now your water should be clear, tasteless and 100 degrees.Your water is now finished. Serve this water on a piece of toast with some butter. Feel free to cool down your water in the freezer, in case you want to save your cooked water for a later date, meaning you won’t need to reheat it because it will be saved in the freezer. Enjoy your water!

Flavor and Flip
The eve of day was chaotic;
Accusations were thrown around.
But after tense, heated discussions,
One exceedingly suspicious person was found:
amalya, who after sensing impending doom,
Claimed she was Malcolm, who by oath bound
As a doctor to harm none, and so could not be a foul invader.
Thus said, she thought her defense sound.
But then fate struck again; a brave soul stepped up,
And in mysterious words proclaimed amalya's defense earthbound,
And said they could not possibly be Malcolm, but were an invader.
The castle staff believed them, and soon did surround,
amalya with murderous intent; soon hanged she was,
Revealing her as part of the Castle Staff (Vanilla Townie), thereafter marked on her burial ground.
...
